scripts.build: bun run --filter @cernosh/core build && bun run --filter @cernosh/server build && bun run --filter @cernosh/server-redis build && bun run --filter @cernosh/react build && bun run --filter @cerno/docs build && bun run --filter @cernosh/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @cernosh/core typecheck && bun run --filter @cernosh/server typecheck && bun run --filter @cernosh/server-redis typecheck && bun run --filter @cernosh/react typecheck && bun run --filter @cernosh/worker typecheck
